rationale: Section 26.041 governs tax rate calculations for units imposing additional sales and use tax. Its formulas use 'current total value,' which already reflects exemptions. Increasing the homestead exemption reduces taxable value inputs but requires no amendment to this section's operative text.
quote: NO-NEW-REVENUE TAX RATE = [(LAST YEAR'S LEVY - LOST PROPERTY LEVY) / (CURRENT TOTAL VALUE - NEW PROPERTY VALUE)] - SALES TAX GAIN RATE
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase affects taxable value, an input variable in the §26.041 formulas, but does not require modification to the section's operative provisions.
